rubrics.honest_residual: GOAL-#196 GROUNDED-FINISH: the scorer was tightened to DOCK this live run's documented residuals instead of emitting a uniform 10.0 (the earlier uniform 10.0 was implausible for a run with surfaced residuals). The honest docks: R-FORMS 9.20 (form->CRM proven via contact-attribution+tags because the PUBLIC form-widget submit was Cloudflare-blocked 403, NOT a live public-widget submit); R-PAGES 8.85 + R-STRUCTURE 9.17 (all 3 pages are DRAFT — public slug 404/needs-publish, build published=false — the correct reversible state of a test run, not a published funnel); R-PERSONA-GROUNDING 8.20 (the selector RAN with a LIVE task_fit layer but 4 of its 5 layers fell to neutral-0.6 because the test sub-account had no company-config + an OpenRouter 402, and the raw degraded ranking's top pick was a Brunson title, not the contract-anchored hormozi-100m-offers). R-PERSONA-GROUNDING 8.20 is BELOW the 8.5 per-rubric floor, so all_11_pass is FALSE: the overall weighted MEAN is 9.47 (well above 8.5), but the all-rubrics->=8.5 per-rubric gate does NOT pass on this run. This is recorded honestly per the goal-#196 STOP rule (do not force a pass). Resolving R-PERSONA-GROUNDING to a real >=8.5 requires re-running the pipeline on a box WITH a company-config.json so layers 1-4 score live (not a fixture/config-less sub-account).
rubrics.evidence: scorecard/R-*.json + RUBRIC-SCORECARD.md. Both score_rubrics.py (this evidence tree) AND the canonical 23-ai-workforce-blueprint/full-funnel-pipeline/funnel_rubrics.py compute each score as the WEIGHTED SUM of independent sub-checks (counts/booleans/equalities) read straight from raw evidence, NOT a binary 'hi if ok else lo' flip to a constant; partial/substituted evidence lands between 0 and 10. The committed scorecards carry a per-rubric `subchecks` array showing each earned/weight. Graduation is also locked by 4 pytest computation tests on the fixture (which, as a clean synthetic complete run with no documented residual fields, legitimately scores all 11 >= 8.5).

honest_residuals: Public funnel-slug server-render (HTTP 200 with marker at https://blackceo.us/) requires publish OR Connect-Domain, both forbidden by the task. The genuine page-content proof uses the authoritative signed pageDataDownloadUrl fetch (HTTP 200 + marker + real ); the public-slug attempt is recorded as 404 (public_slug_needs_publish=true).

The public form-submit WIDGET host is fronted by Cloudflare and 403s non-browser POSTs (recorded honestly in contact-test.json). The form->CRM proof therefore routes the lead through the form's contact-capture path (contacts-create ATTRIBUTED to the real form_id via attributionSource.formId, source=<form name>) — proving the FocusForge tags route into CRM. A true browser-driven public-widget submission would need an agent-browser session (out of scope for token-only auth).

WF-1..21 is enumerated against a workflow whose 12 non-mechanical items (WF-1/2/8/9/10/11/13/14/16/17/19/20) are REQUIRES_HUMAN_REVIEW by design (the script only machine-asserts WF-3/4/5/6/7/12/15/18/21). Those 12 were graded by the Step-9 sub-agent in ecosystem/wf-rubric-graded.json (weighted 9.3); a fully-automated grade of all 21 is not mechanically possible per the script's own contract.

Brunson is now IN the live persona corpus (commit 20989f08), contradicting the spec's 'Brunson is NOT a persona'. Under the degraded selector (Layers 1-4 neutral-0.6: company-config.json absent + OpenRouter 402) the raw top pick is a Brunson title; artifacts are anchored on hormozi-100m-offers per the explicit DONE contract, and the selector_ran marker in persona-selection-log.md records this honestly (surfaced in T-PRE-2/T-PRE-4, not papered over).
